subcodes.first_line: The garment of the body hath been created from the prison, and the spirit hath been renewed with the ornament of remembrance. Take heed, O ye who possess insight [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد خلق قمیص الجسم من السجن و الروح جدد بطراز الذکر ان اعتبروا یا اولی الابصار
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
